source_note: San Diego Matcha Cafes Research Report supplied by the project owner. Menu records include only prices explicitly surfaced in the report.

cafes.name: 12 Hrs Matcha Cafe
cafes.menu_summary: Matcha-focused Pacific Beach cafe known for einspanner-style drinks and rotating tiramisu, mango, birthday-cake, and ube specials. A stable plain-latte price was not surfaced.
cafes.research_label: Official order page and official social sources

cafes.name: Asa Bakery & Cafe
cafes.menu_summary: Japanese bakery and cafe serving Shizuoka organic matcha alongside matcha croissants and matcha kinako donuts.

drinks.name: Shizuoka Organic Matcha Latte
drinks.description: 12 oz hot matcha latte made with Shizuoka organic matcha. Iced sizes carry menu surcharges.

cafes.name: The Barista Botanist
cafes.menu_summary: Ceremonial-grade matcha program with unsweetened, strawberry, yuzu-lemonade, and rotating fruit-cloud builds.

drinks.name: Organic Ceremonial Grade Matcha (Unsweetened)
drinks.description: Unsweetened organic ceremonial-grade matcha.

drinks.name: Strawberry Matcha
drinks.description: Ceremonial matcha layered with strawberry.

drinks.name: Yuzu Matcha Lemonade
drinks.description: Ceremonial matcha with bright yuzu lemonade.

cafes.name: Boba Religion
cafes.menu_summary: Ingredient-forward tea bar serving handcrafted milk tea, fruit tea, Vietnamese coffee, organic boba, and matcha lattes. Current matcha pricing was not crawlable.

cafes.name: Bopomofo Cafe
cafes.menu_summary: Premium matcha program with fruit-forward signature lattes alongside hojicha, tea, milk tea, and food.

drinks.name: BA-LA Matcha
drinks.description: Bopomofo's premium BA-LA matcha signature.

drinks.name: Triple Strawberry Matcha
drinks.description: Premium matcha with a triple-strawberry profile.

drinks.name: Blueberry Matcha Latte
drinks.description: Premium matcha latte with blueberry.

cafes.name: Cafe 88
cafes.menu_summary: Dessert cafe advertising crepes, waffles, shakes, coffee, and matcha. A stable itemized matcha menu was not surfaced.
cafes.research_label: Official link hub and social source

cafes.name: Cafe Alessie
cafes.menu_summary: Large matcha section ranging from a classic latte to fruit, cold-cream, and dessert-inspired seasonal builds.

drinks.description: Strawberries-and-cream-inspired matcha.

cafes.name: Camellia Rd Tea Bar
cafes.menu_summary: Tea bar with matcha tea, matcha lattes, and rotating strawberry, mango, and cold-foam matcha applications. Current pricing was incomplete.

cafes.menu_summary: Pacific Beach cafe with a straightforward matcha latte and rotating banana and mango matcha specials.

drinks.name: Matcha Latte
drinks.description: Matcha latte starting at $6; larger or customized versions reach $7.50.

cafes.name: Easy Does It
cafes.menu_summary: Coffee, matcha, and tea program with rotating seasonal drinks; Matcha Passionfruit Tonic is a visible current signature.

cafes.name: Friends of Friends
cafes.menu_summary: National City cafe with special matcha menus and dessert collaborations. A stable current regular matcha menu was not surfaced.

cafes.menu_summary: Scratch-made cafe and deli with banana crème matcha and strawberry matcha among its rotating drinks.
